projectDescription: A retro-futuristic AI mining intelligence terminal for Club HashCash on Avalanche, providing real-time claim optimization, scenario simulation, and miner strategy profiling.
keyFeatures: Claim Advisor — WAIT vs. CLAIM verdict based on pending rewards and gas fee thresholds
Oracle Scenario Simulation — 3x3 Bear/Base/Bull matrix across 30/90/180-day horizons
FOMO Machine — Counterfactual modeling showing opportunity cost of suboptimal decisions
Miner Archetypes — 6-question assessment classifying miners into strategic personas
AI Strategy Chat — Claude-powered mining consultant with full game mechanic context
Tactical Dashboard — Live hCASH price, network hashrate, and claim cycle status
Miner Catalog — 32 NFT miners with efficiency, payback, and hashrate-per-hCASH metrics
Wallet Integration — RainbowKit/Wagmi for Avalanche wallet connection (read-only)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/chat — Streaming AI strategy advice via Claude (SSE)
POST /api/oracle — Oracle scenario matrix reading via Claude
calculateArchetype(answers: number[]) => string — Scores quiz answers to archetype ID
MINERS: Miner[] — Full catalog with computed efficiency, paybackDays, hashPerHCASH
ARCHETYPES — 6 miner personas: compounder, efficiency_hawk, accumulator, halving_sniper, liquidity_player, field_recruit
